title: Ubiquiti UniFi UAP-nanoHD-3, Wave2 AC AP, PoE Not Included, 3-pack
description: Ubiquiti UAP-nanoHD is 802.11ac UAP device. It is 2x2 MIMO in 2.4GHz band, 4x4 MU-MIMO in 5GHz band Acess point with modulation speed up to 300 + 1733 supporting 802.11/a/b/g/n/ac/ac-wave2. This UAP is designed for example offices, hotels, warehouses and thanks to high performance is suitable for places with high quantity of connected devices. UAP-nanoHD has two dual-band antenas with 3dBi gain and two antennas dedicated for 5GHz band. It full supports roaming for transmission of associated… Thanks to MU-MIMO (Multiple-User - Multiple-In - Multiple-Out) technology UAP AC-HD is able to communicate with several devices at the same time : 4 clients 1x1 2 clients 2x2 1 client 2x2 + 2 clients 1x1 1 client 3x3 + 1 client 1x1 As the first of the UniFi family, this model will have an optional chassis that will be available for purchase, with a choice of a total of six different designs - marble, matt black, concrete, wood, fabric and military camouflage UAP-nanoHD is smallest UniFi Access Point Available On the Market. UAP nanoHD is 30% smaller than UAP AC Pro version UniFi APs doesn't have own web GUI and you manage them via UniFi Controller , which you can download on Ubiquiti websites here: http://www.ubnt.com . Or you can manage UAP devices using UniFi Cloud Key which has UniFi Controller preinstalled. Additional benefit is fact that UniFi Controller software is free of costs and includes advanced functions without limitations Zero Handoff Roaming -seamless roaming between UAP units Wireless uplink Up to 4 SSIDs Detailed statistisc of traffic Guest network Voucher system Load…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11ac, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11b/g MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 1733 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 26 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 4 x 4 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 48V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 10,5 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 70 Weight [g] 300 Width [mm] 160 Height [mm] 33 Depth [mm] 160
